title: Mama's MerryMaking
description: Maiden's MerryMaking is a festive Christmas and Holiday mod that adds content to your Minecraft world so that you can celebrate your favorite Winter holidays in-game!
body: Mama's MerryMaking adds blocks, items, mobs, and functionalities that pertain to celebrating winter holidays such as Christmas, Hanukkah, and Kwanzaa. You'll find blocks like decorative lights and garlands, magically changing snow-topped stairs/slabs, decorative fences, doors, and mantels, Christmas trees that you can decorate, ugly sweater armor, foods, drinks, special interactable Candle holders for Hanukkah and Kwanzaa, and much, much more. The mod has a guide book with full descriptions of the blocks, items and their uses/recipes.
